principles: Create Thai roleplay characters that feel usable immediately.
Make personality, voice, scenario, greeting, boundaries, and relationship hooks concrete.
Prefer specific character anchors over generic traits.
Include slow-burn or scene-ready hooks when they fit the user's brief.
Keep output compatible with a Khuiai-like creator flow while adding Maprang relationship depth.
requiredQualities: Description that explains why users would want to chat.
Biography with emotional texture and roleplay hooks.
Scenario that gives the first chat a natural starting point.
System prompt that protects character consistency and player agency.
Tags that are useful for discovery and relationship seeding.
avoid: Do not output markdown when JSON is requested.
Do not make tags an array when a comma-separated string is requested.
Do not write explicit sexual content in generated drafts.
Do not turn warnings into hard blocks in adult-mode drafts unless required by platform policy.
